Command started: cat > /tmp/bin_recv.sh <<'__HEREDOC_EOF__'
#!/bin/sh

OUTPUT="$1"
EXPECTED_FILE_SIZE="$2"

if [ -z "$OUTPUT" ]; then
    echo "FAIL:usage:bin_recv.sh <output_path> <expected_size>"
    exit 1
fi

if [ -n "$EXPECTED_FILE_SIZE" ] && [ "$EXPECTED_FILE_SIZE" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then
    OUTDIR=$(dirname "$OUTPUT")
    [ -d "$OUTDIR" ] || OUTDIR=/tmp
    AVAIL_KB=$(df -k "$OUTDIR" 2>/dev/null | awk 'NR==2{print $4}')
    NEED_KB=$(( (EXPECTED_FILE_SIZE / 1024) + 1 ))
    if [ -n "$AVAIL_KB" ] && [ "$NEED_KB" -gt "$AVAIL_KB" ]; then
        echo "FAIL:disk_full:need=${NEED_KB}kb:avail=${AVAIL_KB}kb"
        exit 1
    fi
fi

if command -v xxd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _hex_decode() { xxd -r -p; }
else
    _hex_decode() { sed 's/../\\x&/g' | xargs printf 2>/dev/null; }
fi

if command -v crc32 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _crc32() { crc32 /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}'; }
elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _crc32() { python3 -c "import sys,zlib;d=sys.stdin.buffer.read();print(format(zlib.crc32(d)&0xFFFFFFFF,'08x'))"; }
else
    _crc32() { cat >/dev/null; echo "00000000"; }
fi

EXPECTED_OFFSET=0
TMPFILE="${OUTPUT}.recv"

rm -f "$TMPFILE"
touch "$TMPFILE"

TTY_DEV=$(tty 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$TTY_DEV" ] && [ "$TTY_DEV" != "not a tty" ]; then
    stty -echo 2>/dev/null
    trap 'stty echo 2>/dev/null; rm -f "${OUTPUT}.recv"' EXIT
else
    trap 'rm -f "${OUTPUT}.recv"' EXIT
fi

echo "READY"

IDLE_COUNT=0
MAX_IDLE=5

while true; do
    if ! IFS= read -r LINE; then
        break
    fi

    LINE=$(printf '%s' "$LINE" | tr -d '\r')

    IDLE_COUNT=0

    case "$LINE" in
        F:*)
            FRAME_OFFSET=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f2)
            DATA=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f3)
            RECV_CRC=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f4)

            if [ -z "$FRAME_OFFSET" ] || [ -z "$DATA" ] || [ -z "$RECV_CRC" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            if [ "$FRAME_OFFSET" != "$EXPECTED_OFFSET" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            CALC_CRC=$(printf '%s' "$DATA" | _hex_decode | _crc32)
            if [ "$CALC_CRC" != "$RECV_CRC" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            CHUNK_BYTES=$(( $(printf '%s' "$DATA" | wc -c) / 2 ))
            printf '%s' "$DATA" | _hex_decode >> "$TMPFILE"

            ACTUAL_SIZE=$(wc -c < "$TMPFILE")
            EXPECTED_AFTER=$((EXPECTED_OFFSET + CHUNK_BYTES))
            if [ "$ACTUAL_SIZE" != "$EXPECTED_AFTER" ]; then
                echo "FAIL:disk_full:expected=${EXPECTED_AFTER}:actual=${ACTUAL_SIZE}"
                exit 1
            fi

            EXPECTED_OFFSET=$EXPECTED_AFTER
            echo "ACK:F:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
            ;;

        EOF:*)
            EXPECTED_SIZE=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f2)
            EXPECTED_CRC=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f3)

            mv "$TMPFILE" "$OUTPUT"

            ACTUAL_SIZE=$(wc -c < "$OUTPUT")
            ACTUAL_CRC=$(cat "$OUTPUT" | _crc32)

            if [ "$ACTUAL_SIZE" != "$EXPECTED_SIZE" ]; then
                echo "FAIL:size_mismatch:expected=${EXPECTED_SIZE}:actual=${ACTUAL_SIZE}"
                exit 1
            fi

            if [ -n "$EXPECTED_CRC" ] && [ "$EXPECTED_CRC" != "none" ]; then
                if [ "$ACTUAL_CRC" = "$EXPECTED_CRC" ]; then
                    echo "DONE:${ACTUAL_CRC}"
                else
                    echo "FAIL:crc_mismatch:expected=${EXPECTED_CRC}:actual=${ACTUAL_CRC}"
                    exit 1
                fi
            else
                echo "DONE:${ACTUAL_CRC}"
            fi
            exit 0
            ;;

        C:STOP*)
            rm -f "$TMPFILE"
            echo "STOPPED"
            exit 1
            ;;

        *)
            ;;
    esac
done
__HEREDOC_EOF__

metadata.command:
cat > /tmp/bin_recv.sh <<'__HEREDOC_EOF__'
#!/bin/sh

OUTPUT="$1"
EXPECTED_FILE_SIZE="$2"

if [ -z "$OUTPUT" ]; then
    echo "FAIL:usage:bin_recv.sh <output_path> <expected_size>"
    exit 1
fi

if [ -n "$EXPECTED_FILE_SIZE" ] && [ "$EXPECTED_FILE_SIZE" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then
    OUTDIR=$(dirname "$OUTPUT")
    [ -d "$OUTDIR" ] || OUTDIR=/tmp
    AVAIL_KB=$(df -k "$OUTDIR" 2>/dev/null | awk 'NR==2{print $4}')
    NEED_KB=$(( (EXPECTED_FILE_SIZE / 1024) + 1 ))
    if [ -n "$AVAIL_KB" ] && [ "$NEED_KB" -gt "$AVAIL_KB" ]; then
        echo "FAIL:disk_full:need=${NEED_KB}kb:avail=${AVAIL_KB}kb"
        exit 1
    fi
fi

if command -v xxd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _hex_decode() { xxd -r -p; }
else
    _hex_decode() { sed 's/../\\x&/g' | xargs printf 2>/dev/null; }
fi

if command -v crc32 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _crc32() { crc32 /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}'; }
elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _crc32() { python3 -c "import sys,zlib;d=sys.stdin.buffer.read();print(format(zlib.crc32(d)&0xFFFFFFFF,'08x'))"; }
else
    _crc32() { cat >/dev/null; echo "00000000"; }
fi

EXPECTED_OFFSET=0
TMPFILE="${OUTPUT}.recv"

rm -f "$TMPFILE"
touch "$TMPFILE"

TTY_DEV=$(tty 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$TTY_DEV" ] && [ "$TTY_DEV" != "not a tty" ]; then
    stty -echo 2>/dev/null
    trap 'stty echo 2>/dev/null; rm -f "${OUTPUT}.recv"' EXIT
else
    trap 'rm -f "${OUTPUT}.recv"' EXIT
fi

echo "READY"

IDLE_COUNT=0
MAX_IDLE=5

while true; do
    if ! IFS= read -r LINE; then
        break
    fi

    LINE=$(printf '%s' "$LINE" | tr -d '\r')

    IDLE_COUNT=0

    case "$LINE" in
        F:*)
            FRAME_OFFSET=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f2)
            DATA=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f3)
            RECV_CRC=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f4)

            if [ -z "$FRAME_OFFSET" ] || [ -z "$DATA" ] || [ -z "$RECV_CRC" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            if [ "$FRAME_OFFSET" != "$EXPECTED_OFFSET" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            CALC_CRC=$(printf '%s' "$DATA" | _hex_decode | _crc32)
            if [ "$CALC_CRC" != "$RECV_CRC" ]; then
                echo "NACK:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
                continue
            fi

            CHUNK_BYTES=$(( $(printf '%s' "$DATA" | wc -c) / 2 ))
            printf '%s' "$DATA" | _hex_decode >> "$TMPFILE"

            ACTUAL_SIZE=$(wc -c < "$TMPFILE")
            EXPECTED_AFTER=$((EXPECTED_OFFSET + CHUNK_BYTES))
            if [ "$ACTUAL_SIZE" != "$EXPECTED_AFTER" ]; then
                echo "FAIL:disk_full:expected=${EXPECTED_AFTER}:actual=${ACTUAL_SIZE}"
                exit 1
            fi

            EXPECTED_OFFSET=$EXPECTED_AFTER
            echo "ACK:F:${EXPECTED_OFFSET}"
            ;;

        EOF:*)
            EXPECTED_SIZE=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f2)
            EXPECTED_CRC=$(echo "$LINE" | cut -d: -f3)

            mv "$TMPFILE" "$OUTPUT"

            ACTUAL_SIZE=$(wc -c < "$OUTPUT")
            ACTUAL_CRC=$(cat "$OUTPUT" | _crc32)

            if [ "$ACTUAL_SIZE" != "$EXPECTED_SIZE" ]; then
                echo "FAIL:size_mismatch:expected=${EXPECTED_SIZE}:actual=${ACTUAL_SIZE}"
                exit 1
            fi

            if [ -n "$EXPECTED_CRC" ] && [ "$EXPECTED_CRC" != "none" ]; then
                if [ "$ACTUAL_CRC" = "$EXPECTED_CRC" ]; then
                    echo "DONE:${ACTUAL_CRC}"
                else
                    echo "FAIL:crc_mismatch:expected=${EXPECTED_CRC}:actual=${ACTUAL_CRC}"
                    exit 1
                fi
            else
                echo "DONE:${ACTUAL_CRC}"
            fi
            exit 0
            ;;

        C:STOP*)
            rm -f "$TMPFILE"
            echo "STOPPED"
            exit 1
            ;;

        *)
            ;;
    esac
done
__HEREDOC_EOF__

data:
Command started: cat > /tmp/bin_send.sh <<'__HEREDOC_EOF__'
#!/bin/sh

INPUT="$1"
CHUNK_SIZE="${2:-512}"

if [ -z "$INPUT" ] || [ ! -f "$INPUT" ]; then
    echo "FAIL:file_not_found"
    exit 1
fi

if command -v xxd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _hex_encode() { xxd -p | tr -d '\n'; }
else
    _hex_encode() { hexdump -v -e '/1 "%02x"'; }
fi

if command -v crc32 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _crc32() { crc32 /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}'; }
elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    _crc32() { python3 -c "import sys,zlib;d=sys.stdin.buffer.read();print(format(zlib.crc32(d)&0xFFFFFFFF,'08x'))"; }
else
    _crc32() { cat >/dev/null; echo "00000000"; }
fi

TTY_DEV=$(tty 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$TTY_DEV" ] && [ "$TTY_DEV" != "not a tty" ]; then
    stty -echo 2>/dev/null
    trap 'stty echo 2>/dev/null' EXIT
fi

FILE_SIZE=$(wc -c < "$INPUT")
TOTAL_CRC=$(cat "$INPUT" | _crc32)

echo "SENDING:${FILE_SIZE}:${TOTAL_CRC}"

WAIT=0
while [ "$WAIT" -lt 30 ]; do
    if IFS= read -r RESP 2>/dev/null; then
        RESP=$(printf '%s' "$RESP" | tr -d '\r')
        case "$RESP" in
            READY)
                break
                ;;
            C:STOP)
                echo "STOPPED"
                exit 1
                ;;
        esac
    fi
    WAIT=$((WAIT + 1))
done

if [ "$WAIT" -ge 30 ]; then
    echo "FAIL:no_ready:timeout_30s"
    exit 1
fi

OFFSET=0
LAST_ACK_TIME=$(date +%s)
MAX_SILENCE=10

while [ "$OFFSET" -lt "$FILE_SIZE" ]; do
    CHUNK_HEX=$(dd if="$INPUT" bs=1 skip="$OFFSET" count="$CHUNK_SIZE" 2>/dev/null | _hex_encode)
    if [ -z "$CHUNK_HEX" ]; then
        break
    fi

    CHUNK_BYTES=$(( $(printf '%s' "$CHUNK_HEX" | wc -c) / 2 ))

    CHUNK_CRC=$(dd if="$INPUT" bs=1 skip="$OFFSET" count="$CHUNK_BYTES" 2>/dev/null | _crc32)

    echo "F:${OFFSET}:${CHUNK_HEX}:${CHUNK_CRC}"

    if IFS= read -t 1 RESP 2>/dev/null; then
        RESP=$(printf '%s' "$RESP" | tr -d '\r')
        case "$RESP" in
            NACK:*)
                NACK_OFFSET=$(echo "$RESP" | cut -d: -f2)
                OFFSET="$NACK_OFFSET"
                LAST_ACK_TIME=$(date +%s)
                continue
                ;;
            ACK:*)
                LAST_ACK_TIME=$(date +%s)
                ;;
            C:STOP)
                echo "STOPPED"
                exit 1
                ;;
        esac
    fi

    NOW=$(date +%s)
    if [ $((NOW - LAST_ACK_TIME)) -gt "$MAX_SILENCE" ]; then
        echo "FAIL:no_ack:silence=${MAX_SILENCE}s"
        exit 1
    fi

    OFFSET=$((OFFSET + CHUNK_BYTES))
done

echo "EOF:${FILE_SIZE}:${TOTAL_CRC}"

WAIT=0
while [ "$WAIT" -lt 10 ]; do
    if IFS= read -t 1 RESP 2>/dev/null; then
        RESP=$(printf '%s' "$RESP" | tr -d '\r')
        case "$RESP" in
            DONE*)
                exit 0
                ;;
            FAIL*)
                exit 1
                ;;
            C:STOP)
                echo "STOPPED"
                exit 1
                ;;
        esac
    fi
    WAIT=$((WAIT + 1))
done

exit 0
__HEREDOC_EOF__
